text: Evolution didn't give you perfection.
prompt:
A beautiful statue that is heavily flawed.

Scene: Clean minimal flat illustration, simple bold shapes, thick outlines. A majestic, classical white marble statue of a human torso on a pedestal. However, the statue has a massive crack running down the middle and one of the arms is attached upside down with messy silver duct tape. 16:9 horizontal format, pure white background, no clutter.

Style Notes: Juxtaposing high art with terrible, sloppy execution.

text: It gave you character.
prompt:
Embracing the flaws with style.

Scene: A simple black stick figure, round circle head, thin black lines for body and limbs, dot eyes, minimal curved mouth showing a cool, confident smile. The figure is standing in a highly crooked, terrible, slouched posture, but is gracefully tipping a stylish black top hat to the viewer. 16:9 horizontal format, pure white background.

Style Notes: Owning the brokenness with extreme charisma.

text: And a really bad lower back.
prompt:
The immediate reality of the bad design returns.

Scene: A simple black stick figure, round circle head, thin black lines for body and limbs, dot eyes, mouth forming a jagged line of sharp pain. The cool posture from the previous frame is instantly broken as the figure hunches over, clutching its lower back. Bright red, jagged lightning bolts (clean minimal flat illustration) radiate from the lower back area. 16:9 horizontal format, pure white background.

Style Notes: Sharp comedic contrast from confident to instantly in immense pain.

text: Subscribe before your epiglottis gives out,
prompt:
An urgent call to action before biological failure.

Scene: A simple black stick figure, round circle head, thin black lines for body and limbs, dot eyes, mouth open in an urgent shout. The figure is frantically pointing with both hands at a massive, bright red 'SUBSCRIBE' button (clean minimal flat illustration) hovering in the center. Next to the button, a tiny pink anatomical epiglottis flap is drawn visibly cracking and crumbling apart into dust. 16:9 horizontal format, pure white background.

Style Notes: Urgent, comedic panic driving the call to action.

text: and I'll see you next time.
prompt:
A classic, friendly sign-off.

Scene: A simple black stick figure, round circle head, thin black lines for body and limbs, dot eyes, minimal curved mouth showing a warm, friendly smile. The figure is happily waving one hand at the viewer, standing completely upright and normal again. 16:9 horizontal format, pure white background.

Style Notes: Clean, standard, cheerful outro.
